title: Umami Crumbly Norwegian Polish Sausage Crock Pot Cumble
description: A whole30-friendly, sick-day dish featuring crumbly sausage that's perfect for a quick, comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Umami Flavored Broth or Broth Powder

instructions: Preheat your crock pot to low.
Place the sausage slices in a single layer at the bottom of the crock pot, leaving some space around them for expansion.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic over the sausages. Stir gently.
Sprinkle umami flavored broth or powder evenly over the vegetables and sausages to keep everything moist and tender during cooking.
Cover and cook on low for 4-6 hours, turning off heat at least once more halfway through the process to allow any excess liquid to evaporate slightly. This will help create a crumbly texture.
Remove from crock pot after cooking, let cool slightly before serving. Use fork to shred sausage into bite-sized pieces and serve with your favorite toppings like sour cream or avocado.
